Appearances:
Plaintiff LiQuiang Wen is present.
Attorney Lien Lac Uy appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jian Dong Wen is present.
Attorney Jean Chung representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Amanda L. Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Ebey.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
